summary: Applied ADR 0304 by replaying Step-CA from the latest realistic live baseline commit e28f1e51729a23c5a3d9b384ec285571a50cfa58 (repo version 0.177.142 / platform version 0.130.90), then rebasing onto origin/main head d10174f9f04c6b2e72581e6a262d5c96d0d07d0f (repo version 0.177.149 / platform version 0.130.93) after the exact-main GlitchTip integration release, replaying OpenBao and Windmill, refreshing Atlas snapshots, re-verifying both repo-side and seeded Windmill drift detection clean across the 20 cataloged PostgreSQL databases, rerunning the governed validation automation lanes, and cutting the integrated main release surfaces for repo version 0.177.150.

make atlas-refresh-snapshots, make atlas-validate, make atlas-lint, and make atlas-drift-check all completed successfully after the latest-main replay, with drift_count 0 across the 20 cataloged PostgreSQL databases and no emitted NATS or ntfy notifications.
scripts/windmill_run_wait_result.py against f/lv3/atlas_drift_check returned returncode 0 with report.status clean, drift_count 0, and no published notifications.
The rebased regression slice passed on the final protected-surface closeout tree with 22 targeted tests green after the 0.177.150 release cut.

The full governed pre-push sweep on the rebased 0.177.149 tree passed every lane except generated-docs and dependency-graph, both blocked only by the stale generated docs/diagrams/agent-coordination-map.excalidraw artifact; after regenerating that shared diagram, the exact remaining governed closeout checks re-passed on the final 0.177.150 tree.

The exact configured local fallback for make remote-validate passed on the rebased tree, including ansible-syntax, schema-validation, atlas-lint, policy-validation, iac-policy-scan, alert-rule-validation, type-check, dependency-graph, agent-standards, and workstream-surfaces.

notes: This receipt supersedes receipts/live-applies/2026-04-01-adr-0304-atlas-mainline-live-apply.json as the authoritative mainline proof for ADR 0304.

The exact-main GlitchTip release landed on origin/main while this live apply was in flight. That release changed shared release, docs, and canonical-truth surfaces but did not change the Atlas, OpenBao, or Windmill live-apply automation path, so the Step-CA replay from e28f1e51729a23c5a3d9b384ec285571a50cfa58 and the later OpenBao, Windmill, Atlas, and rebased validation replays form the authoritative combined verification set.

This closeout keeps the first verified live-apply platform truth for ADR 0304 at 0.130.90 while promoting the database_schema receipt and the final repository truth into release 0.177.150 on top of the current mainline platform version 0.130.93.
